headline: KeyBanc lowers Nike rating to Sector Weight on near-term uncertainty
summary: Investing.com -- KeyBanc Capital Markets downgraded Nike to Sector Weight from Overweight, flagging a slower-than-expected turnaround, mounting headwinds in China and Europe, and a management transition that further clouds the near-term outlook.

content.title: KeyBanc lowers Nike rating to Sector Weight on near-term uncertainty
content.summary: Investing.com -- KeyBanc Capital Markets downgraded Nike to Sector Weight from Overweight, flagging a slower-than-expected turnaround, mounting headwinds in China and Europe, and a management transition that further clouds the near-term outlook.
